title: Tesla Energy Site Live Status
description: Real-time power flow and state-of-charge snapshot returned by GET /energy_sites/{site_id}/live_status. Power values are signed: positive battery_power means discharging, positive grid_power means importing from the grid.

battery_power.description: Instantaneous battery power in watts (positive = discharging).

grid_power.description: Instantaneous grid power in watts (positive = importing).

load_power.description: Instantaneous home or site load in watts.

generator_power.description: Instantaneous generator power in watts (if installed).

total_pack_energy.description: Total Powerwall (or Megapack) pack energy capacity in watt-hours.

grid_status.description: Whether the grid is currently connected.

backup_capable.description: Whether the site can island and provide backup power.

storm_mode_active.description: True when Storm Mode is currently pre-charging or holding.
